title: HitRangeBox
description: This will allow you to see if players near you are in your avalible to hit range meaning if you look twards them at the correct angle you'll be able to deal damage to the player in question
body: This mod adds a box around any player that you are close enough to hit even if you're not looking at them just to give a visual that it is possible to hit someone from your possition and their possition
